title: FG_Fx_PressForce Property
description:
This property sets pressing force to Fx direction during the execution of force guide objects.

It is used when Fx_ControlMode is Press+ or Press-

Values

When ControlMode is Press+:

Value (unit:  [N])

Minimum value -250

Maximum value 0

Default:  0

When ControlMode is Press-

Value (unit:  [N])

Minimum value 0

Maximum value 250

Default:  0

See Also: Fx_PressForce Property

Fx_ControlMode Property
see_also:
Applies To

Press Object, PressMove Object
